title: `utf8mb4_0900_bin` shouldn't write `RestoredData`
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin, description VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, value VARCHAR(255) CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_bin, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE name = 'example' AND description IS NOT NULL;
